name: @jeswr/solid-dav-bridge
description: CalDAV (RFC 4791) + CardDAV (RFC 6352) → Solid pod. A read/import-only bridge that maps a well-specified protocol (iCalendar VEVENT / vCard) to the suite's established RDF models — VEVENT → schema:Event (+ W3C RDF-iCal ical: for fields schema.org lacks, RRULE carried raw), vCard → vcard:AddressBook via @jeswr/solid-task-model's ./contacts buildPerson/buildAddressBook (never hand-built triples). Pure mappers are fixture-tested with no network; the optional DAV fetch dereferences a user URL ONLY through @jeswr/guarded-fetch (SSRF-safe). Owner-private import (phase 1), untrusted-input hardened, DAV credentials never logged.
author: Jesse Wright

scripts.api:check: npm run build && api-extractor run --local && git diff --exit-code -- etc/
scripts.lint: biome check src test scripts && npm run check:lockfile-transport
scripts.gate: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && npm run check:dist && npm run api:check && npm run check:lockfile-transport
